story.text:
# ✨ Fit Staff
**☤ → 🪶 → ⚖️ → 🔧**
*caducea · fitting · V0-conventional*

Fit a Hermes-class staff to a specific Mage: read the SOUL.md, draft the AGENTS.md, walk the bilateral consent ceremony.

> The staff promises itself. The bearer promises her bearing. The herald presides over both.

*Keywords:* fit · Hermes-class · SOUL.md · AGENTS.md · bilateral · peripatetic
